# StoxFeed
> Daily stock market and financial markets intelligence

StoxFeed is an independent publication tracking the pulse of the stock market
and financial markets. We cover equities, earnings reports, market trends,
sector rotations, IPOs, and the forces moving stock prices.

## Key Resources
- Signal Tracker: /signals/ — 10 tracked market signals with evidence
- Monthly Reports: /monthly-reports/ — editorial synthesis of monthly trends
- Daily Coverage: / — curated news with professional analysis
- Newsletter: /newsletter/ — weekly digest and signal alerts

## Topics Covered
Technology stocks, healthcare equities, energy markets, financial sector,
cryptocurrency, earnings reports, Fed policy, IPOs, M&A activity, sector
rotations, market volatility, index movements, institutional flows.

## Audience
Traders, portfolio managers, financial analysts, market strategists,
fintech professionals, retail investors, and financial industry analysts.
